aids.title: Cross-Entropy Gradient Magic
aids.content: Softmax + Cross-Entropy gradient = prediction - target. This elegant result is why this combination is standard for classification.

aids.title: Loss as Punishment
aids.content: MSE is like a harsh teacher who squares your mistakes - small errors are forgiven, big errors are severely punished. MAE is a fair teacher - punishment equals the mistake.

aids.title: BCE Formula Breakdown
aids.content: BCE = -[y*log(p) + (1-y)*log(1-p)]. When y=1, only -log(p) matters. When y=0, only -log(1-p) matters. Low p for y=1 gives high loss!
